BTC.reasoning: Extreme Fear with declining OI and neutral funding points to advanced deleveraging (contrarian lean), yet persistent taker sell pressure and price downtrend keep momentum bearish. Signals conflict, no clear edge.

ETH.reasoning: Extreme Fear weighed as momentum: OI not falling and longs remain crowded (>2.4), so no capitulation. Persistent taker sell pressure and rising OI confirm downside risk. Price already -19% 7d/-29% 30d aligns. Volatile swings justify wide 7-12% stops.
